title: HOME VISITING PROGRAM - 211info
text: PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS HOME VISITING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support to families who are involved in the criminal justice system through weekly home visits which include helping parents with child-centered play, learning about childhood development, developmental screening, and information and referral to other social and health services 7305 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Families who are involved in the criminal justice system who have children ages 0-6 regardless of current custodial status Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 892-5396 1003 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 892-5396 ext 1003 Michelle Wright [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Home Based Parenting Education * Ex-Offenders Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALING TRAUMA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INSIDE OUT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - BUILDING RESILIENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS
